title: Umwhen did Asuka kick down that grave marker
display_title: Umwhen did Asuka kick down that grave marker
wikitext:
[]: Um...when did Asuka kick down that grave marker?             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Oct 23, 2007 2:38 pm There seems to be a lot about Asuka kicking down a grave marker. When did this happen? Somebody help me here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 23, 2007 2:43 pm This was one of the many variant bits of ending for which script outline or storyboard exist, but which didn't make the final cut. The fallen grave marker here is noted in the final storyboards as being knocked over or kicked over, a remnant of that unused strand of narrative. See the entry "Last A" here: http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/livesequence.html Unfortunately, the Japanese site with the original material linked to from there has vanished into the ether; but you may be able to get some joy from the Internet Archive: http://web.archive.org/web/%2A/http://www.age.ne.jp/x/t-igrs/eva/evamain.htm

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Oct 23, 2007 4:03 pm Ah, spiffing

Article: Umwhen did Asuka kick down that grave marker
[]: Um...when did Asuka kick down that grave marker?             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Oct 23, 2007 2:38 pm There seems to be a lot about Asuka kicking down a grave marker. When did this happen? Somebody help me here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 23, 2007 2:43 pm This was one of the many variant bits of ending for which script outline or storyboard exist, but which didn't make the final cut. The fallen grave marker here is noted in the final storyboards as being knocked over or kicked over, a remnant of that unused strand of narrative. See the entry "Last A" here: http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/livesequence.html Unfortunately, the Japanese site with the original material linked to from there has vanished into the ether; but you may be able to get some joy from the Internet Archive: http://web.archive.org/web/%2A/http://www.age.ne.jp/x/t-igrs/eva/evamain.htm
